message:
test(fuzz): add 1281 fuzz corpus entries for btrfs metadata, ext4 xattr, and vfs operations

Commit discovered fuzz corpus from the fuzzing infrastructure added in
527980e. These corpus entries represent edge cases found by the fuzzer
that exercise corner cases in btrfs metadata parsing, ext4 extended
attribute handling, and VFS operation dispatch.

Corpus breakdown by target:
- fuzz_btrfs_metadata: ~1200 entries covering b-tree node parsing,
  chunk/dev-extent validation, and metadata integrity checks
- fuzz_ext4_xattr: ~50 entries targeting extended attribute block
  parsing, inline vs block transitions, and malformed header handling
- fuzz_vfs_operations: ~30 entries exercising path resolution, inode
  lookup, and directory traversal edge cases

Committing the corpus ensures regression protection — these inputs
will be reused in future fuzz runs as seed corpus, preventing the
fuzzer from having to rediscover known edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
